EmailTemplate.description: CRM Team Email when Agreement Expired.
EmailTemplate.name: Agreement will Expire
EmailTemplate.subject: {!Convention__c.Name} - will expire on on {!Convention__c.ExpirationDate__c} - {!Convention__c.Company__c} - {!Convention__c.Company_Country__c}
EmailTemplate.textOnly:
Hello
This is to notify that the Agreement {!Convention__c.Name} will expire in one month.
View Agreement information by clicking here - {!Convention__c.Link}
This is an automated email, please do no reply to this email.
